title: feat: move observability Grafana to Cloudflare
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
## Summary
- Renames the operation Grafana app from `economics` to `observability`.
- Adds the Cloudflare Worker + Container deployment for Grafana at `observability.pollinations.ai` and `observability.myceli.ai`.
- Extends the operation Cloudflare deployment workflow to include observability.
- Updates Tinybird rotation references for the renamed operation app.

## Notes
- This PR intentionally excludes KPI and Quest Dashboard shared branding cleanup; that will be a separate cleanup PR.
- Workflow-file changes now deploy all supported operation apps, avoiding partial deployment when the workflow and app files change in the same production push.

## Validation
- Parsed workflow YAML locally.
- `git diff --check` and staged diff check passed.
- `npm ci` in `apps/operation/observability`.
- `npm run check` in `apps/operation/observability`.
- Local Docker build for the Grafana image passed.
- Live manual deployment already verified `https://observability.pollinations.ai/api/health` with Grafana `11.4.0` and database `ok`.

gist.headline: Eyes in the clouds
gist.blurb: We've moved our internal observability dashboards to Cloudflare. Better monitoring means a healthier hive!
gist.summary: Migrated the internal Grafana observability app to a Cloudflare Worker and Container deployment at observability.pollinations.ai.
gist.impact: This improves the reliability of our internal monitoring tools, helping us keep the platform running smoothly.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot looking at glowing charts/graphs on a retro monitor, floating in the clouds (Cloudflare metaphor).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny aviator goggles, looking at a retro CRT monitor displaying glowing lime green (#ecf874) bar charts. The monitor is resting on a fluffy white cloud against a soft pastel lavender sky. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like A Short Hike.
